exploration_memo:
## Exploration Memo (1 failed attempts)

### Attempts Log
- #1: Compiled and packaged JAR successfully, but Flink job failed to run correctly and output did not match expected results

### Commands From Last Attempt
```
cd /app/workspace && mvn compile
cd /app/workspace && mvn package -q
java -jar target/LongestSessionPerJob-jar-with-dependencies.jar --task_input ... --job_input ... --output /tmp/test_output.txt
java -cp target/LongestSessionPerJob-jar-with-dependencies.jar clusterdata.query.LongestSessionPerJob --task_input ... --job_input ...
unzip -p .../MANIFEST.MF
timeout 120 java -cp ... clusterdata.query.LongestSessionPerJob ... & sleep 30 && cat /tmp/test_output.txt
zcat data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F',' '$6==0 {print $3}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -10
zcat data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F',' '$4==4' | head -5
grep -n "println|toString|out.collect" .../LongestSessionPerJob.java
```

### Verified Facts
- Maven build succeeds (`test_maven_build` passes)
- JAR is produced at `target/LongestSessionPerJob-jar-with-dependencies.jar`
- Main class is `clusterdata.query.LongestSessionPerJob`
- Task events CSV field 6 (index) relates to task scheduling; job events field 4 relates to job state
- Flink job does NOT run successfully end-to-end (test_flink_job_runs fails)
- Output does NOT match expected results (test_output_matches_expected fails)

### Current Error Pattern
The Flink job either crashes at runtime, times out, or produces incorrect output. The job accepts `--task_input`, `--job_input`, and `--output` args. The output file either isn't written or contains wrong data. Root cause is likely in the query logic inside `LongestSessionPerJob.java` — incorrect session window definition, wrong field parsing, wrong aggregation, or output formatting mismatch.

### Next Strategy
1. Read the full source of `LongestSessionPerJob.java` to understand current logic
2. Check the test file `test_outputs.py` to see exactly what `test_flink_job_runs` and `test_output_matches_expected` assert (expected output format, values, file path)
3. Inspect a sample of both input CSVs to confirm field indices for timestamps, job IDs, task states
4. Fix the query logic to correctly compute the longest session per job and write output in the exact expected format
5. Re-run with a short timeout to confirm output is produced before submitting

attempts.agent_commands:
cd /app/workspace && mvn compile 2>&1 | tail -20
cd /app/workspace && mvn package -q 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo "Package done"
ls /app/workspace/target/*.jar 2>/dev/null
/bin/bash -lc "cd /app/workspace && java -jar target/LongestSessionPerJob-jar-with-dependencies.jar \\
  --task_input data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz \\
  --job_input data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz \\
  --output /tmp/test_output.txt 2>&1 | grep -v \""'^[0-9]'"\\{4\\}-\" | tail -20"
/bin/bash -lc "cd /app/workspace && java -cp target/LongestSessionPerJob-jar-with-dependencies.jar clusterdata.query.LongestSessionPerJob \\
  --task_input data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz \\
  --job_input data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz \\
  --output /tmp/test_output.txt 2>&1 | grep -E \"task_input|job_input|Exception|ERROR|output\" | head -20"
jar tf /app/workspace/target/LongestSessionPerJob-jar-with-dependencies.jar | grep MANIFEST && jar xf /app/workspace/target/LongestSessionPerJob-jar-with-dependencies.jar META-INF/MANIFEST.MF -C /tmp/ 2>/dev/null; unzip -p /app/workspace/target/LongestSessionPerJob-jar-with-dependencies.jar META-INF/MANIFEST.MF 2>/dev/null
/bin/bash -lc "cd /app/workspace && timeout 120 java -cp target/LongestSessionPerJob-jar-with-dependencies.jar clusterdata.query.LongestSessionPerJob \\
  --task_input data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz \\
  --job_input data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz \\
  --output /tmp/test_output.txt 2>&1 | tail -10 &
sleep 30 && cat /tmp/test_output.txt 2>/dev/null | head -20"
kill %1 2>/dev/null; zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F',' '"'$6==0 {print $3}'"' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -10
zcat /app/workspace/data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F',' '"'$4==4'"' | head -5
grep -n \"println\\|toString\\|out.collect\" /app/workspace/src/main/java/clusterdata/query/LongestSessionPerJob.java | head -10
